scripts.postinstall: node -e "const f=require('fs'); const p='./node_modules/@angular/cli/src/utilities/node-version.js'; if(f.existsSync(p)){ const code=f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/function isNodeVersionSupported\(\)[\s\S]*?\n\}/, 'function isNodeVersionSupported() { return true; }').replace(/function isNodeVersionMinSupported\(\)[\s\S]*?\n\}/, 'function isNodeVersionMinSupported() { return true; }'); f.writeFileSync(p,code); }"
